_doc: FLUID unlock schedule from defillama.com/unlocks/fluid. 77.95% unlocked / 22.05% × 100m = ~22m FLUID still locked. The 'Unlock Events' panel shows DAO Treasury Incentives outflows (mostly negative — releases to the market) totaling small monthly amounts. Future Team & Ecosystem (10.07%) and Team residual (30.53% allocation, partially vested) drive most of the remaining schedule. Chart shows mostly flat from 2025 forward.

events.note: Future Team & Ecosystem 10.07% × 100m, 3y linear through 2027 per chart shape.
DAO Treasury Incentives ~500K FLUID/month based on event values $685k-$1.37m at current price ~$1.37.
